description_long: This rifle features a compact, tactical design with a predominantly matte black and gray finish, accented by a subtle camouflage pattern across its body. The stock is integrated into the main body, forming a thumbhole configuration for ergonomic handling, and the grip area is robust and angular. The magazine is a detachable box type, slightly translucent with an amber tint, positioned just ahead of the trigger guard. The barrel is short and thick, suggesting a carbine or bullpup configuration, and the muzzle is fitted with a small, cylindrical device, likely a flash hider. The upper receiver has a flat top, possibly for mounting optics, but no sighting system is currently visible. The overall build appears to be a mix of metal and polymer, giving it a modern, lightweight yet durable appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact, modern rifle with a thumbhole stock, short barrel, and detachable box magazine, finished in black and gray camouflage. The design is tactical and robust, with a mix of metal and polymer materials.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thumbhole stock, detachable box magazine, and short barrel with a flash hider.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel's muzzle device and the compact width of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same thumbhole stock, magazine, and barrel details from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock's shape and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
